seoTitle: Kunda Park vs Kunioon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kunda Park and Kunioon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kunda Park vs Kunioon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kunda Park and Kunioon.
heading: Kunda Park vs Kunioon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kunda Park, Queensland and Kunioon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kunioon has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kunda Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kunda Park or Kunioon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kunda Park has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Kunioon scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kunda Park scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Kunioon scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kunda Park or Kunioon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kunioon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
